title: Mine RGB
body:
# Mine RGB
OpenRGB integration for Minecraft

**Requires [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) and [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)**

### Usage
1. [Download and install OpenRGB](https://openrgb.org/releases.html)
2. Open OpenRGB and make sure your supported device(s) show up in the Devices tab
3. Go to the SDK server tab and ensure the server host is 0.0.0.0 and the port is 6742
4. Click Start Server
5. Open Minecraft. If everything works, you should see a green M and C on your keyboard when you reach the title screen.

### Supported Features
- Damage and XP effect
- Hunger and health display
- Hotbar selection display
- Single player loading indicator

### Why OpenRGB?
- It's open source
- It works with a [wide selection of devices](https://openrgb.org/devices_0.9.html) (make sure you device supports "Direct" mode)
- It supports MacOS and Linux
